critical_issues.summary: Function App app settings overwrite risk
critical_issues.details: sites/config appsettings originally used a partial object that could remove required existing settings.

suggestions.details: Added a required-true confirmation parameter in the module and propagated it from main for explicit deployment acknowledgement.

suggestions.summary: Add CI verification for infrastructure templates
suggestions.details: Added Bicep build validation in CI to provide deployment-readiness evidence.

suggestions.summary: Consider hardening Key Vault network exposure
suggestions.details: publicNetworkAccess remains Enabled by design in this issue scope to avoid changing networking behavior unexpectedly.

suggestions.summary: Key Vault reference assumes secret exists
suggestions.details: Secret seeding is out of scope for INF-01 and would require introducing secret management inputs/processes.
